meta.title: Parking - JFK Airport
meta.description: Find JFK parking options for short-term and long-term stays. Compare rates, locations, and reserve your spot online.

ogTags.og:description: Find JFK parking options for short-term and long-term stays. Compare rates, locations, and reserve your spot online.
ogTags.og:image:alt: John F. Kennedy International Airport logo

headings.text: Parking for travelers with restricted mobility

sections.textPreview: Parking at the airport is limited due to construction and heavy traffic. Use public transportation if possible. Book parking in advance to reserve a space. You can arrive up to two hours early with prebooked parking.

Beginning April 6 the surface lot of the Terminal 4 Blue parking will be permanently closed. There will no longer be any parking for standard vehicles over 6’4” in height in the Terminal 4 Blue garage.

sections.heading: Parking details by lot
sections.textPreview: Parking details by lotSave money and guarantee a spot when you book parking at least 3 hours in advance If you plan to park at JFK for more than 30 days in any lot, when you arrive at the airport, you must register your vehicle with ABM Parking by calling +1 (718) 244-4168 or ema

sections.heading: Paying for Parking
sections.textPreview: Paying for ParkingCredit, Debit, or Contactless PaymentCustomers can pay for parking with credit or debit cards (MasterCard, Visa, Discover, American Express), E-ZPass, or contactless payments like Apple Pay, Google Pay, or Samsung Pay. To save time when leaving, use a credit or

sections.heading: E-ZPass Plus
sections.textPreview: E-ZPass PlusCustomers can use their E-ZPass tag to pay for airport parking. E-ZPass Plus is available if: Customer has registered for E-ZPass Plus at the E-ZPass Plus website. opens in a new tab Replenished E-ZPass account with a valid credit card. sections.heading: Parking for travelers with restricted mobility
sections.textPreview: Parking for travelers with restricted mobilityParking spaces for customers with disabilities are available in every parking lot, including near terminal entrances and in the long-term lot near the Howard Beach and Lefferts Boulevard AirTrain stations. Subject to availability. Veh
Customers should only park on-airport or with an authorized off-airport parking provider.

sections.heading: Electric Vehicle charging stations
sections.textPreview: Electric Vehicle charging stationsEV charging stations are available in some parking lots at JFK. sections.heading: Parking customer services
sections.textPreview: Parking customer servicesIf you have special parking circumstances, billing questions, or other questions, please email ABM Parking customer service. For help while in the parking lot: Free emergency motor vehicle assistance (e.g., flat tire) services call: +1 (718) 244-4168 To r
The AirTrain connects passengers to terminals, airport parking lots, the hotel shuttle area, the rental car center, and public transportation.
